positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a soaring fox and a crescent moon, rendered in negative space and clean silhouettes. The fox is shown mid-leap, tail arcing dramatically, facing upward towards a geometrically perfect, luminous crescent moon. The composition is centered and balanced, using bold black lines and solid blocks of contrasting colors like deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream. The style should be highly graphic, reminiscent of linocut printmaking mixed with modern Art Deco flair. The lighting is high-contrast and dramatic, emphasizing the crisp edges of the silhouettes. The overall aesthetic must be immediately readable, highly scalable for apparel printing, and suitable for a broad, whimsical, yet elegant audience. Perfect central composition, isolated subject matter, vector graphic quality.
